<a id="index--apache-commons-codec"></a>

# Apache Commons Codec

Apache Commons Codec (TM) software provides implementations of common encoders and decoders
such as Base64, Hex, Phonetic and URLs.

<a id="index--impetus"></a>

# Impetus

Codec was formed as an attempt to focus development effort on one
definitive implementation of the Base64 encoder. At the time of
Codec's proposal, there were approximately 34 different Java
classes that dealt with Base64 encoding spread over the
Foundation's CVS repository. Developers in the Jakarta Tomcat
project had implemented an original version of the Base64 codec
which had been copied by the Commons HttpClient and Apache XML
project's XML-RPC subproject. After almost one year, the two
forked versions of Base64 had significantly diverged from one
another. XML-RPC had applied numerous fixes and patches which
were not applied to the Commons HttpClient Base64. Different
subprojects had differing implementations at various levels
of compliance with the [RFC 2045](https://www.ietf.org/rfc/rfc2045).

Out of that confusing duplication of effort sprang this simple
attempt to encourage code reuse among various projects. While
this package contains an abstract framework for the creation of
encoders and decoders, Codec itself is primarily focused on
providing functional utilities for working with common encodings.

<a id="index--documentation"></a>

# Documentation

An overview of the functionality is provided in the
[user guide](https://commons.apache.org/proper/commons-codec/userguide.html).
Various [project reports](#project-reports) are also available.

The Javadoc API documents are available online:

- [Javadoc latest version](https://commons.apache.org/proper/commons-codec/apidocs/index.html)
- [Javadoc archive](https://javadoc.io/doc/commons-codec/commons-codec)

The [Git repository](#scm) can be
[browsed](https://gitbox.apache.org/repos/asf?p=commons-codec.git).

<a id="index--releases"></a>

# Releases

- [Download latest version (mirrors)](https://commons.apache.org/codec/download_codec.cgi); requires Java 8 or above
- [Download archive](https://archive.apache.org/dist/commons/codec/)

See the
[Download Page](https://commons.apache.org/codec/download_codec.cgi)
for the latest releases.

[Change reports](#changes) are also available.

For previous releases, see the [Apache Archive](https://archive.apache.org/dist/commons/codec/)

<a id="index--support"></a>

# Support

The [commons mailing lists](https://commons.apache.org/proper/commons-codec/mail-lists.html) act as the main support forum.
The user list is suitable for most library usage queries.
The dev list is intended for the development discussion.
Please remember that the lists are shared between all commons components, so prefix your email by [codec].

Issues may be reported via [ASF JIRA](https://commons.apache.org/proper/commons-codec/issue-tracking.html).

## Release 1.22.0 – 2026-04-19

| Type | Changes | By |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Fix | Fix Incorrect transform of CH digraph according Metaphone basic rules #423. Fixes [CODEC-249](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-249). Thanks to Shalu Jha, Andrey, Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | ColognePhonetic can create duplicate consecutive codes in some cases. Fixes [CODEC-317](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-317). Thanks to DRUser123, Shalu Jha, Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Add boundary tests for BinaryCodec.fromAscii partial-bit inputs #425. Thanks to fancying, Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Base64.Builder.setUrlSafe(boolean) Javadoc incorrectly states null is accepted for primitive boolean parameter. Fixes [CODEC-336](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-336). Thanks to Partha Paul, Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Add | Add Base58 support. Fixes [CODEC-326](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-326). Thanks to Inkeet, Gary Gregory, Wolff Bock von Wuelfingen. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Add | Add BaseNCodecInputStream.AbstracBuilder.setByteArray(byte[]). Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Add | Add GitIdentifiers to compute Git blob and tree object identifiers. Fixes [CODEC-335](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-335). Thanks to Piotr P. Karwasz, Gary Gregory. | [pkarwasz](#team--pkarwasz) |
| Update | Bump org.apache.commons:commons-parent from 96 to 98. Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |

Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |

| Fix | Simplify assertion #84. Fixes [CODEC-301](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-301). Thanks to Alexander Pinske, Alex Herbert. | [aherbert](#team--aherbert) |
| Fix | Simplify assertion #84. Fixes [CODEC-300](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-300). Thanks to Arturo Bernal. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Use Standard Charset object #82. Fixes [CODEC-298](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-298). Thanks to Arturo Bernal. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Use String.contains() functions #125. Thanks to Arturo Bernal. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Avoid use toString() or substring() in favor of a simplified expression #126. Thanks to Arturo Bernal. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Fix byte-skipping in Base16 decoding #135. Fixes [CODEC-305](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-305). Thanks to Florian. | [aherbert](#team--aherbert) |
| Fix | Fix several typos, improve writing in some javadocs #139. Thanks to Marc Wrobel. | [kinow](#team--kinow) |
| Fix | BaseNCodecOutputStream.eof() should not throw IOException. Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Javadoc improvements and cleanups. Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Deprecate BaseNCodec.isWhiteSpace(byte) and use Character.isWhitespace(int). Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Add | Add support for Blake3 family of hashes. Fixes [CODEC-296](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-296). Thanks to Matt Sicker. | [mattsicker](#team--mattsicker) |
| Add | Add github/codeql-action. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Update | Bump actions/cache from v2 to v3.0.10 #75, #99, #119, #138, #149, #152. Thanks to Dependabot, Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Update | Bump actions/setup-java from v1.4.1 to 3.5.1 #60, #62, #121. Thanks to Dependabot, Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Update | Bump actions/checkout from 2.3.2 to 3.1.0 #65, #98, #114, #153. Thanks to Dependabot, Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Update | Bump commons-parent from 52 to 58, #147, #165, #170. Thanks to Dependabot, Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Update | Bump junit from 4.13.1 to 5.9.1 #76, #39, #140, #148. Fixes [CODEC-285](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-285). Thanks to Dependabot, John Patrick. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Update | Bump Java 7 to 8. Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Update | Bump japicmp-maven-plugin from 0.14.3 to 0.17.1. Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Update | Bump jacoco-maven-plugin from 0.8.5 to 0.8.8 (Fixes Java 15 builds). Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Update | Bump maven-surefire-plugin from 2.22.2 to 3.0.0-M7 #122, #134. Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Update | Bump maven-javadoc-plugin from 3.2.0 to 3.4.1. Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Update | Bump animal-sniffer-maven-plugin from 1.19 to 1.22. Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Update | Bump maven-pmd-plugin from 3.13.0 to 3.19.0, #133, #142, #145. Thanks to Gary Gregory, Dependabot. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Update | Bump pmd from 6.47.0 to 6.52.0. Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Update | Bump maven-checkstyle-plugin from 2.17 to 3.2.0 #143. Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Update | Bump checkstyle from 8.45.1 to 9.3 #97, #100, #101, #103. Thanks to Dependabot. | [kinow, ggregory](#team--kinow-ggregory) |
| Update | Bump taglist-maven-plugin from 2.4 to 3.0.0 #102. Thanks to Dependabot. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Update | Bump jacoco-maven-plugin from 0.8.7 to 0.8.8. Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |

<a id="changes--release-1.15-2020-09-01"></a>

## Release 1.15 – 2020-09-01

| Type | Changes | By |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Fix | MurmurHash3: Ensure hash128 maintains the sign extension bug. Fixes [CODEC-264](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-264). Thanks to Andy Seaborne. | [aherbert](#team--aherbert) |
| Update | Base32/Base64/BCodec: Added strict decoding property to control handling of trailing bits. Default lenient mode discards them without error. Strict mode raise an exception. Fixes [CODEC-280](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-280). | [aherbert](#team--aherbert) |
| Update | Base32/Base64 Input/OutputStream: Added strict decoding property to control handling of trailing bits. Default lenient mode discards them without error. Strict mode raise an exception. Fixes [CODEC-289](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-289). | [aherbert](#team--aherbert) |
| Update | Update tests from JUnit 4.12 to 4.13. Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Add | Base16Codec and Base16Input/OutputStream. Fixes [CODEC-290](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-290). Thanks to Adam Retter. | [aherbert](#team--aherbert) |
| Add | Hex encode/decode with existing arrays. Fixes [CODEC-291](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-291). Thanks to Adam Retter. | [aherbert](#team--aherbert) |
| Update | Update actions/checkout from v1 to v2.3.2 #50, #56. Thanks to Dependabot. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Update | Update actions/setup-java from v1.4.0 to v1.4.1 #57. Thanks to Dependabot. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |

<a id="changes--release-1.14-2019-12-30"></a>

## Release 1.14 – 2019-12-30

| Type | Changes | By |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Fix | Hex: Allow encoding read-only ByteBuffer. Fixes [CODEC-261](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-261). | [aherbert](#team--aherbert) |
| Fix | Hex: Only use an available ByteBuffer backing array if the length equals the remaining byte count. Fixes [CODEC-259](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-259). | [aherbert](#team--aherbert) |
| Update | MurmurHash3: Deprecate hash64 methods and hash methods accepting a String that use the default encoding. Fixes [CODEC-268](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-268). | [aherbert](#team--aherbert) |
| Fix | BaseNCodec to expand buffer using overflow conscious code. Fixes [CODEC-265](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-265). | [aherbert](#team--aherbert) |
| Fix | Base32/64: Fixed decoding check that all the final trailing bits to discard are zero. Fixes [CODEC-270](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-270). | [aherbert](#team--aherbert) |
| Add | Add MurmurHash3.hash128x64 methods to fix sign extension error during seeding in hash128 methods. Fixes [CODEC-264](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-264). Thanks to Claude Warren. | [aherbert](#team--aherbert) |
| Add | Add MurmurHash3.hash32x86 methods and IncrementalHash32x86 to fix sign extension error in hash32 methods. Fixes [CODEC-267](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-267). Thanks to Claude Warren. | [aherbert](#team--aherbert) |
| Fix | Allow repeat calls to MurmurHash3.IncrementalHash32.end() to generate the same value. Fixes [CODEC-269](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-269). | [aherbert](#team--aherbert) |
| Add | Add RandomAccessFile digest methods #31. Fixes [CODEC-272](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-272). Thanks to Behrang, Alex Herbert, Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Add | Add Path APIs to org.apache.commons.codec.digest.DigestUtils similar to File APIs. Fixes [CODEC-273](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-273). Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Add | Add SHA-512/224 and SHA-512/256 to DigestUtils for Java 9 and up. Fixes [CODEC-274](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-274). Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Add | Add missing note in javadoc when sign extension error is present #34. Fixes [CODEC-275](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-275). Thanks to Claude Warren. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Reliance on default encoding in MurmurHash2 and MurmurHash3. Fixes [CODEC-276](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-276). Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Update | Don't reload standard Charsets in org.apache.commons.codec.Charsets. Fixes [CODEC-277](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-277). Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Update | Deprecate Charset constants in org.apache.commons.codec.Charsets in favor of java.nio.charset.StandardCharsets. Fixes [CODEC-278](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-278). Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |

<a id="changes--release-1.13-2019-07-20"></a>

## Release 1.13 – 2019-07-20

| Type | Changes | By |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Fix | ColognePhonetic handles x incorrectly. Fixes [CODEC-255](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-255). Thanks to Holger Grote. | [sebb](#team--sebb) |
| Fix | ColognePhonetic does not treat the letter H correctly. Fixes [CODEC-254](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-254). Thanks to Holger Grote. | [sebb](#team--sebb) |
| Fix | Reject any decode request for a value that is impossible to encode to for Base32/Base64 rather than blindly decoding. Fixes [CODEC-134](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-134). | [tmousaw-ptc](#team--tmousaw-ptc) |
| Add | MurmurHash2 for 32-bit or 64-bit value. Fixes [CODEC-236](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-236). Thanks to Viliam Holub. | [melloware](#team--melloware) |
| Add | MurmurHash3 for 32-bit or 128-bit value. Fixes [CODEC-236](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-236). Thanks to Austin Appleby. | [melloware](#team--melloware) |
| Update | Broken direct java.nio.ByteBuffer support in org.apache.commons.codec.binary.Hex. Fixes [CODEC-236](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-236). Thanks to Tomas Shestakov, Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |

<a id="changes--release-1.12-2019-02-04"></a>

## Release 1.12 – 2019-02-04

| Type | Changes | By |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Fix | B64 salt generator: Random -> ThreadLocalRandom. Fixes [CODEC-252](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-252). | [chtompki](#team--chtompki) |
| Fix | Wrong value calculated by Cologne Phonetic if a special character is placed between equal letters. Fixes [CODEC-250](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-250). Thanks to Alex Volodko. | [sebb](#team--sebb) |
| Update | Update from Java 6 to Java 7. Fixes [CODEC-244](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-244). | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Add | Add Percent-Encoding Codec (described in RFC3986 and RFC7578). Fixes [CODEC-240](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-240). Thanks to Ioannis Sermetziadis. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | ColognePhoneticTest.testIsEncodeEquals missing assertions. Fixes [CODEC-246](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-246). Thanks to Oscar Luis Vera Pérez. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Add | Add SHA-3 methods in DigestUtils. Fixes [CODEC-251](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-251). Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |

<a id="changes--release-1.11-2017-10-20"></a>

## Release 1.11 – 2017-10-20

| Type | Changes | By |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Add | Add support for XXHash32. Fixes [CODEC-241](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-241). | - |
| Update | Base32.decode should support lowercase letters. Fixes [CODEC-234](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-234). Thanks to Christopher Schultz, Sebb. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Update | Soundex should support more algorithm variants. Fixes [CODEC-233](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-233). Thanks to Yossi Tamari. | [sebb](#team--sebb) |
| Fix | Base64.encodeBase64String could better use newStringUsAscii (ditto encodeBase64URLSafeString). Fixes [CODEC-145](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-145). Thanks to Jesse Glick. | [sebb](#team--sebb) |
| Fix | BaseNCodec: encodeToString and encodeAsString methods are identical. Fixes [CODEC-144](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-144). | [sebb](#team--sebb) |
| Fix | URLCodec is neither immutable nor threadsafe. Fixes [CODEC-232](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-232). | [sebb](#team--sebb) |
| Fix | StringUtils.equals(CharSequence cs1, CharSequence cs2) can fail with String Index OBE. Fixes [CODEC-231](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-231). | [sebb](#team--sebb) |
| Fix | URLCodec.WWW\_FORM\_URL should be private. Fixes [CODEC-230](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-230). | [sebb](#team--sebb) |
| Fix | StringUtils.newStringxxx(null) should return null, not NPE. Fixes [CODEC-229](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-229). | [sebb](#team--sebb) |
| Add | Fluent interface for DigestUtils. Fixes [CODEC-220](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-220). | [sebb](#team--sebb) |
| Add | Fluent interface for HmacUtils. Fixes [CODEC-222](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-222). | [sebb](#team--sebb) |
| Fix | Fix minor resource leaks. Fixes [CODEC-225](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-225). Thanks to Svetlin Zarev. | [jochen](#team--jochen) |
| Remove | Drop obsolete Ant build. Fixes [CODEC-223](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-223). | [sebb](#team--sebb) |
| Add | Add support for CRC32-C. Fixes [CODEC-171](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-171). Thanks to Brett Okken. | [sebb](#team--sebb) |
| Update | HmacUtils.updateHmac calls reset() unnecessarily. Fixes [CODEC-221](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-221). | [sebb](#team--sebb) |
| Fix | Base32.HEX\_DECODE\_TABLE contains the wrong value 32. Fixes [CODEC-200](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-200). Thanks to Luciano Vernaschi. | [sebb](#team--sebb) |
| Fix | Charsets Javadoc breaks build when using Java 8. Fixes [CODEC-207](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-207). Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Bug in HW rule in Soundex. Fixes [CODEC-199](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-199). Thanks to Yossi Tamari. | [ggregory/sebb](#team--ggregory-sebb) |
| Fix | Javadoc for SHA-224 DigestUtils methods should mention Java 1.8.0 restriction instead of 1.4.0. Fixes [CODEC-209](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-209). Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Don't deprecate Charsets Charset constants in favor of Java 7's java.nio.charset.StandardCharsets. Fixes [CODEC-219](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-219). Thanks to Gary Gregory, Sebb. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Add | Add HmacAlgorithms.HMAC\_SHA\_224 (Java 8 only). Fixes [CODEC-217](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-217). Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Add | Support JEP 287: SHA-3 Hash Algorithms. Fixes [CODEC-213](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-213). Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Add | Create a minimal Digest command line utility: org.apache.commons.codec.digest.Digest. Fixes [CODEC-212](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-212). Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Add | Add DigestUtils.getDigest(String, MessageDigest). Fixes [CODEC-210](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-210). Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Add | Make some DigestUtils APIs public. Fixes [CODEC-208](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-208). Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Add | Add java.io.File APIs to MessageDigestAlgorithm. Fixes [CODEC-206](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-206). Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Add | BaseNCodecOutputStream only supports writing EOF on close(). Fixes [CODEC-183](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-183). Thanks to Steven Wurster. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Add | Support SHA-224 in DigestUtils on Java 8. Fixes [CODEC-195](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-195). Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Add | Support java.nio.ByteBuffer in org.apache.commons.codec.binary.Hex. Fixes [CODEC-194](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-194). Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Add | Support java.nio.ByteBuffer in DigestUtils. Fixes [CODEC-193](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-193). Thanks to Michael Donaghy. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Add | Add BaseNCodec.encode(byte[], int, int) input with offset and length parameters for Base64 and Base32. Fixes [CODEC-202](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-202). Thanks to Oleg Kalnichevski. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Add | Add convenience method decodeHex(String). Fixes [CODEC-203](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-203). Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Add | Add faster CRC32 implementation. Fixes [CODEC-205](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-205). Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Add | Add convenience API org.apache.commons.codec.binary.Hex.encodeHexString(byte[]|ByteBuffer, boolean). Fixes [CODEC-224](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-224). Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Add | Add Automatic-Module-Name manifest entry for Java 9. Fixes [CODEC-242](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-242). Thanks to Gary Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |

<a id="changes--release-1.10-5-november-2014"></a>

## Release 1.10 – 5 November 2014

| Type | Changes | By |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Add | Add Daitch-Mokotoff Soundex. Fixes [CODEC-192](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-192). Thanks to Thomas Neidhart. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Add | QuotedPrintableCodec does not support soft line break per the 'quoted-printable' example on Wikipedia. Fixes [CODEC-121](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-121). Thanks to Thomas Neidhart, Java John. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Added clarification to Javadoc of Base64 concerning the use of the urlSafe parameter. Fixes [CODEC-185](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-185). Thanks to Sean Busbey. | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Fix | Added clarification to the Javadoc of Base[32|64]OutputStream that it is mandatory to call close(). Fixes [CODEC-191](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-191). Thanks to Igor Savin. | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Fix | Add support for HMAC Message Authentication Code (MAC) digests. Fixes [CODEC-188](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-188). Thanks to Hendrik Saly. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Beider Morse Phonetic Matching producing incorrect tokens. Fixes [CODEC-187](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-187). Thanks to Michael Tobias, Thomas Neidhart. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | NullPointerException in DoubleMetaPhone.isDoubleMetaphoneEqual when using empty strings. Fixes [CODEC-184](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-184). Thanks to Cyrille Artho. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Add | Make possible to provide padding byte to BaseNCodec in constructor. Fixes [CODEC-181](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-181). Thanks to Ivan Martinez-Ortiz. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Fix Javadoc 1.8.0 errors. Fixes [CODEC-180](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-180). Thanks to Ville Skyttä. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Update | Deprecate Charsets Charset constants in favor of Java 7's java.nio.charset.StandardCharsets. Fixes [CODEC-178](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-178). | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Fix Java 8 build Javadoc errors. Fixes [CODEC-189](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-189). | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Update | Update from commons-parent 34 to 35. Fixes [CODEC-190](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-190). | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |

<a id="changes--release-1.9-20-december-2013"></a>

## Release 1.9 – 20 December 2013

| Type | Changes | By |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Update | Improve performance of Beider Morse encoder. Fixes [CODEC-174](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-174). Thanks to Thomas Champagne. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Beider Morse does not close Scanners used to read config files. Fixes [CODEC-175](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-175). | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Base32 decode table has spurious value. Fixes [CODEC-172](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-172). Thanks to Matt Bishop. | [sebb](#team--sebb) |
| Fix | Link broken in Metaphone Javadoc. Fixes [CODEC-170](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-170). Thanks to Ron Wheeler, Henri Yandell. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Spelling fixes in Javadoc and comments. Fixes [CODEC-176](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-176). Thanks to Ville Skyttä. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |

<a id="changes--release-1.8-19-april-2013"></a>

## Release 1.8 – 19 April 2013

| Type | Changes | By |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Add | Add DigestUtils.updateDigest(MessageDigest, InputStream). Fixes [CODEC-168](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-168). Thanks to Daniel Cassidy. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Add | Add JUnit to test our decode with pad character in the middle. Fixes [CODEC-167](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-167). | [julius](#team--julius) |
| Add | Add Match Rating Approach (MRA) phonetic algorithm encoder. Fixes [CODEC-161](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-161). Thanks to crice. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | ColognePhonetic encoder unnecessarily creates many char arrays on every loop run. Fixes [CODEC-163](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-163). Thanks to leo141. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Base64.encodeBase64URLSafeString doesn't add padding characters at the end. Fixes [CODEC-160](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-160). | [sebb](#team--sebb) |

<a id="changes--release-1.7-11-september-2012"></a>

## Release 1.7 – 11 September 2012

| Type | Changes | By |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Add | DigestUtils: Add MD2 APIs. Fixes [CODEC-157](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-157). Thanks to ggregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Add | DigestUtils: add APIs named after standard algorithm name SHA-1. Fixes [CODEC-156](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-156). Thanks to ggregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Add | DigestUtils.getDigest(String) should throw IllegalArgumentException instead of RuntimeException. Fixes [CODEC-155](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-155). Thanks to ggregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Add | Create a class MessageDigestAlgorithms to define standard algorithm names. Fixes [CODEC-153](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-153). Thanks to ggregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Add | DigestUtils.getDigest(String) loses the original exception. Fixes [CODEC-152](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-152). Thanks to ggregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Add | Remove unnecessary attempt to fill up the salt variable in UnixCrypt. Fixes [CODEC-151](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-151). Thanks to lathspell. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Add | Remove unnecessary call to Math.abs(). Fixes [CODEC-150](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-150). Thanks to lathspell. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Add | More tests and minor things. Fixes [CODEC-148](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-148). Thanks to lathspell. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Add | Added regression tests for PhoneticEngine based on Solr-3.6.0. Fixes [CODEC-146](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-146). Thanks to Julius Davies. | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Update | BeiderMorseEncoder/PhoneticEngine: make results deterministic by using a LinkedHashSet instead of a HashSet. Fixes [CODEC-147](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-147). | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Update | StringBuffer could be replaced by StringBuilder for local variables. Fixes [CODEC-143](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-143). | [sebb](#team--sebb) |
| Add | DigestUtils: add updateDigest methods and make methods public. Fixes [CODEC-139](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-139). Thanks to dsebastien. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Add | Add classes for MD5/SHA1/SHA-512-based Unix crypt(3) hash variants. Fixes [CODEC-133](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-133). Thanks to lathspell. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Base64 encode() method is no longer thread-safe, breaking clients using it as a shared BinaryEncoder. Note: the fix breaks binary compatibility, however the changes are to a class (BaseNCodec) which is intended for internal use. Fixes [CODEC-96](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-96). Thanks to sebb. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Complete FilterInputStream interface for BaseNCodecInputStream. Fixes [CODEC-138](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-138). | [sebb](#team--sebb) |
| Fix | Use Charset objects when possible, create Charsets for required character encodings. Fixes [CODEC-136](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-136). | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | BeiderMorseEncoder OOM issues. Fixes [CODEC-132](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-132). Thanks to rcmuir. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | DoubleMetaphone Javadoc contains dead links. Fixes [CODEC-131](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-131). Thanks to smolav. | [tn](#team--tn) |
| Add | Base64InputStream.skip skips underlying stream, not output. Fixes [CODEC-130](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-130). Thanks to tn. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Add | Implement NYSIIS phonetic encoder. Fixes [CODEC-63](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-63). Thanks to tn. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |

<a id="changes--release-1.6-20-november-2011"></a>

## Release 1.6 – 20 November 2011

| Type | Changes | By |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Fix | Use standard Maven directory layout. Fixes [CODEC-129](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-129). Thanks to ggregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Documentation spelling fixes. Fixes [CODEC-128](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-128). Thanks to ville.skytta@iki.fi. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Fix various character encoding issues in comments and test cases. Fixes [CODEC-127](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-127). | [ggregory, sebb](#team--ggregory-sebb) |
| Update | Implement a Beider-Morse phonetic matching codec. Fixes [CODEC-125](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-125). Thanks to Matthew Pocock. | [ggregory, matthewpocock](#team--ggregory-matthewpocock) |
| Update | Migrate to Java 5. Fixes [CODEC-119](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-119). | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Update | Migrate to JUnit 4. Fixes [CODEC-120](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-120). | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | ColognePhonetic Javadoc should use HTML entities for special characters. Fixes [CODEC-123](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-123). | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |

<a id="changes--release-1.5-29-march-2011"></a>

## Release 1.5 – 29 March 2011

| Type | Changes | By |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Add | Added new Base32 encoder. Fixes [CODEC-88](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-88). | [sebb](#team--sebb) |
| Fix | new Base64().encode() appends a CRLF, and chunks results into 76 character lines. Fixes [CODEC-89](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-89). | [sebb](#team--sebb) |
| Fix | Many test cases use getBytes() which uses the default platform encoding so tests may fail on some platforms. Fixes [CODEC-92](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-92). | [sebb](#team--sebb) |
| Add | Add test(s) to check that encodeBase64() does not chunk output. Fixes [CODEC-93](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-93). Thanks to sebb. | [sebb, julius, ggregory](#team--sebb-julius-ggregory) |
| Fix | Base64 default constructor behavior changed to enable chunking in 1.4. Fixes [CODEC-97](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-97). Thanks to mjryall. | [sebb](#team--sebb) |
| Fix | Base64.encodeBase64String() shouldn't chunk. Fixes [CODEC-99](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-99). Thanks to julius. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Base64InputStream#read(byte[]) incorrectly returns 0 at end of any stream which is multiple of 3 bytes long. Fixes [CODEC-101](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-101). Thanks to balusc. | [julius](#team--julius) |
| Fix | Typo in DecoderException message thrown from Hex.decodeHex. Fixes [CODEC-103](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-103). Thanks to gnuf. | [bayard](#team--bayard) |
| Add | ArrayIndexOutOfBoundsException when doing multiple reads() on encoding Base64InputStream. Fixes [CODEC-105](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-105). Thanks to zak. | [julius, ggregory](#team--julius-ggregory) |
| Add | Add the "Kölner Phonetik" encoder (Cologne Phonetic) to codec.lang. Fixes [CODEC-106](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-106). Thanks to it2mmeyerfa. | [bayard](#team--bayard) |
| Add | org.apache.commons.codec.net.URLCodec.ESCAPE\_CHAR isn't final but should be. Fixes [CODEC-111](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-111). Thanks to ggregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Add | Base64.encodeBase64(byte[] binaryData, boolean isChunked, boolean urlSafe, int maxResultSize) throws IAE for valid maxResultSize if isChunked is false. Fixes [CODEC-112](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-112). Thanks to sebb. | [sebb](#team--sebb) |
| Add | org.apache.commons.codec.language.RefinedSoundex.US\_ENGLISH\_MAPPING should be package protected MALICIOUS\_CODE. Fixes [CODEC-113](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-113). Thanks to ggregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Add | org.apache.commons.codec.language.Soundex.US\_ENGLISH\_MAPPING should be package protected MALICIOUS\_CODE. Fixes [CODEC-114](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-114). Thanks to ggregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Add | DoubleMetaphone.maxCodeLen should probably be private. Fixes [CODEC-115](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-115). Thanks to sebb. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Remove | Remove deprecated package private method Base64.discardWhitespace(byte[]). Fixes [CODEC-116](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-116). Thanks to ggregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Caverphone encodes names starting and ending with "mb" incorrectly. Fixes [CODEC-117](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-117). Thanks to ggregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Add | Split Caverphone class into two classes for Caverphone 1.0 and 2.0. Fixes [CODEC-118](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-118). Thanks to ggregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |

<a id="changes--release-1.4-9-august-2009"></a>

## Release 1.4 – 9 August 2009

| Type | Changes | By |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Fix | Regression: Base64.encode(chunk=true) has a bug when input length is multiple of 76. Fixes [CODEC-80](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-80). Thanks to Julius Davies. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Base64 bug with empty input (new byte[0]). Fixes [CODEC-77](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-77). Thanks to Julius Davies. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Make Base64 URL-safe. Fixes [CODEC-75](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-75). Thanks to Julius Davies. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Add | Allow for uppercase letters output in Hex.encodeHex(). Fixes [CODEC-74](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-74). | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Soundex and RefinedSoundex issues with character arrays. Fixes [CODEC-72](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-72). Thanks to Sebb. | [bayard](#team--bayard) |
| Fix | Base64.isArrayByteBase64() method is inefficient for large byte arrays. Fixes [CODEC-71](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-71). Thanks to Sebb. | [bayard](#team--bayard) |
| Fix | Thread safety and malicious code safety improvements. Fixes [CODEC-70](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-70). Thanks to Sebb. | [bayard](#team--bayard) |
| Fix | isBase64 throws ArrayIndexOutOfBoundsException on some non-BASE64 bytes. Fixes [CODEC-68](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-68). Thanks to Robert Rodewald. | [bayard](#team--bayard) |
| Fix | Fix case-insensitive string handling. Fixes [CODEC-65](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-65). Thanks to Benjamin Bentmann. | [bayard](#team--bayard) |
| Fix | Base64.encodeBase64() throws NegativeArraySizeException on large files. Fixes [CODEC-61](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-61). Thanks to Igor Slepchin. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Add | Implement Caverphone. Fixes [CODEC-60](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-60). | [bayard](#team--bayard) |
| Fix | Character set used by Base64 not documented. Fixes [CODEC-58](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-58). Thanks to Julius Davies. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | RefinedSoundex creates instance before al fields have been initialized. Fixes [CODEC-56](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-56). Thanks to Sebb. | [bayard](#team--bayard) |
| Add | Digest on InputStreams. Fixes [CODEC-52](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-52). Thanks to Niklas Gustavsson. | [bayard](#team--bayard) |
| Fix | 2 Test failures in SoundexTest. Fixes [CODEC-51](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-51). | [bayard](#team--bayard) |
| Add | Patch to add crypto-compatible BigInteger encoding support to Base64. Fixes [CODEC-40](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-40). Thanks to Chris Black. | [bayard](#team--bayard) |
| Add | DigestUtils: Add methods for SHA-256, SHA-384, and SHA-512. Fixes [CODEC-39](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-39). Thanks to [Jamie Flournoy](mailto:jamie@white-mountain.org). | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Using US\_ENGLISH in Soundex caused an NullPointerException. Fixes [CODEC-10](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-10). Thanks to [Reggie Riser](mailto:rriser@informs.com). | [tobrien](#team--tobrien) |
| Fix | Source tarball spews files all over the place. Fixes [CODEC-6](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-6). Thanks to David Tonhofer. | [tobrien](#team--tobrien) |
| Fix | Base64.isArrayByteBase64() throws an ArrayIndexOutOfBoundsException for negative octets. Fixes [CODEC-22](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-22). Thanks to Piero Ottuzzi. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Add | Streaming Base64 (Base64InputStream and Base64OutputStream added). Fixes [CODEC-69](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-69). Thanks to Julius Davies. | [jochen](#team--jochen) |
| Fix | Base64: Improve Code Coverage. Fixes [CODEC-78](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-78). Thanks to Julius Davies. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Add | Add methods to Base64 which work with String instead of byte[]. Fixes [CODEC-59](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-59). Thanks to Julius Davies. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Base64's new constructor parameters ignored. Fixes [CODEC-81](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-81). Thanks to Julius Davies. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Improve Double Metaphone test coverage. Fixes [CODEC-83](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-83). | [niallp](#team--niallp) |
| Fix | Double Metaphone bugs in alternative encoding. Fixes [CODEC-84](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-84). | [niallp](#team--niallp) |
| Fix | Make string2byte conversions independent of platform default encoding. Fixes [CODEC-73](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-73). Thanks to Benjamin Bentmann. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |

<a id="changes--release-1.3-10-july-2004"></a>

## Release 1.3 – 10 July 2004

| Type | Changes | By |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Add | BinaryCodec: Encodes and decodes binary to and from Strings of 0s and 1s. Fixes [CODEC-21](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-21). Thanks to Alex Karasulu. | [ggregory, tobrien](#team--ggregory-tobrien) |
| Add | QuotedPrintableCodec: Codec for RFC 1521 MIME (Multipurpose Internet Mail Extensions) Part One. Rules #3, #4, and #5 of the quoted-printable spec are not implemented yet. See also issue CODEC-46. Fixes [CODEC-41](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-41). Thanks to [Oleg Kalnichevski](mailto:olegk@apache.org). | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Add | BCodec: Identical to the Base64 encoding defined by RFC 1521 and allows a character set to be specified. Fixes [CODEC-41](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-41). Thanks to [Oleg Kalnichevski](mailto:olegk@apache.org). | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Add | QCodec: Similar to the Quoted-Printable content-transfer-encoding defined in RFC 1521 and designed to allow text containing mostly ASCII characters to be decipherable on an ASCII terminal without decoding. Fixes [CODEC-41](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-41). Thanks to [Oleg Kalnichevski](mailto:olegk@apache.org). | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Add | Soundex: Implemented the DIFFERENCE algorithm. Fixes [CODEC-45](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-45). Thanks to [Matthew Inger](mailto:mattinger@yahoo.com). | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Add | RefinedSoundex: Implemented the DIFFERENCE algorithm. Fixes [CODEC-45](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-45). Thanks to [Matthew Inger](mailto:mattinger@yahoo.com). | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Update | This version is released under the <a href="https://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0">Apache License 2.0</a> , please see LICENSE.txt. Previous versions were released under the <a href="https://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-1.1">Apache License 1.1</a> | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Update | The Board recommendation to remove Javadoc author tags has been implemented. All author tags are now "Apache Software Foundation". | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | The default URL encoding logic was broken. Fixes [CODEC-25](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-25). Thanks to [Oleg Kalnichevski](mailto:olegk@apache.org). | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Base64 chunked encoding not compliant with RFC 2045 section 2.1 CRLF. Fixes [CODEC-31](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-31). Thanks to Gary D. Gregory. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Hex converts illegal characters to 255. Fixes [CODEC-5](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-5). | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Metaphone now correctly handles a silent B in a word that ends in MB. "COMB" is encoded as "KM", before this fix "COMB" was encoded as "KMB". Fixes [CODEC-17](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-17). | [tobrien](#team--tobrien) |
| Fix | Added missing tags in Javadoc comments. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | General Javadoc improvements. | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |

<a id="changes--release-1.2-24-nov-2003"></a>

## Release 1.2 – 24 Nov 2003

| Type | Changes | By |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Add | URLCodec: Implements the www-form-urlencoded encoding scheme. Thanks to [Oleg Kalnichevski](mailto:olegk@apache.org). | [tobrien](#team--tobrien) |
| Add | DigestUtils: Calculates MD5 and SHA digests. Thanks to Dave Dribin, David Graham. | [tobrien](#team--tobrien) |
| Fix | Modified Base64 to remedy non-compliance with RFC 2045. Non-Base64 characters were not being discarded during the decode. RFC 2045 explicitly states that all characters outside of the base64 alphabet are to be ignored. Fixes [CODEC-26](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-26). Thanks to Brian Ewins. | [tobrien](#team--tobrien) |
| Fix | Hex.decode(Object) throws a ClassCastException when a String argument is passed in. Fixes [CODEC-4](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-4). | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Soundex: The HW rule is not applied; hyphens and apostrophes are not ignored. Fixes [CODEC-3](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-3). | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Soundex.setMaxLength causes bugs and is not needed. Calling Soundex.setMaxLength() with a value of 2 or less causes the wrong answer to be returned. Since the encoding returned by Soundex is always of length 4 by definition (we do not use the '-' in as a letter-nnn separator) the need for a maxLength attribute is not needed. Deprecate the field and accessor methods. Fixes [CODEC-29](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CODEC-29). | [ggregory](#team--ggregory) |
| Fix | Fix in Metaphone relating to the handling of the maximum code length. | [Members](#team--members) |

<a id="changes--release-1.1-29-april-2003"></a>

## Release 1.1 – 29 April 2003

| Type | Changes | By |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Add | A newer version of the Base64 class reflecting improvements from both the commons-httpclient and xml-rpc versions of code forked from catalina. | [Members](#team--members) |
| Add | Base64 class from commons-httpclient in org.apache.commons.codec.base64 has been retained for backwards compatibility but has been deprecated. | [Members](#team--members) |
| Add | Soundex class from commons-util in org.apache.commons.codec. | [Members](#team--members) |
| Add | Metaphone class from commons-util in org.apache.commons.codec. | [Members](#team--members) |
| Add | RefinedSoundex class in org.apache.commons.codec. | [tobrien](#team--tobrien) |
| Add | Encoder/Decoder interfaces in org.apache.commons. | [Members](#team--members) |
| Add | String and Binary specific Encoder/Decoder interfaces in org.apache.commons. | [Members](#team--members) |
| Add | StringEncoderComparator replaces the SoundexComparator from the language package. | [Members](#team--members) |
| Fix | Base64 now discards whitespace characters when decoding encoded content. | [Members](#team--members) |

<a id="changes--release-1.0-dev-25-april-2003"></a>

## Release 1.0-dev – 25 April 2003

| Type | Changes | By |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Add | Base64 class from commons-httpclient in org.apache.commons.codec.base64. | [tobrien](#team--tobrien) |
| Add | Soundex class from commons-util in org.apache.commons.codec. | [tobrien](#team--tobrien) |
| Add | Metaphone class from commons-util in org.apache.commons.codec. | [tobrien](#team--tobrien) |
| Add | SoundexComparator class from commons-util in org.apache.commons.codec. | [Members](#team--members) |

<a id="scm"></a>

<!-- source_url: https://commons.apache.org/proper/commons-codec/scm.html -->

<!-- page_index: 3 -->

<a id="scm--overview"></a>

# Overview

This project uses [Git](https://git-scm.com/) to manage its source code. Instructions on Git use can be found at <https://git-scm.com/doc>.

<a id="scm--web-browser-access"></a>

# Web Browser Access

The following is a link to a browsable version of the source repository:

```
https://github.com/apache/commons-codec
```

<a id="scm--anonymous-access"></a>

# Anonymous Access

The source can be checked out anonymously from Git with this command (See <https://git-scm.com/docs/git-clone>):

```
$ git clone --branch rel/commons-io-2.20.0 https://gitbox.apache.org/repos/asf/commons-codec
```

<a id="scm--developer-access"></a>

# Developer Access

Only project developers can access the Git tree via this method (See <https://git-scm.com/docs/git-clone>).

```
$ git clone --branch rel/commons-io-2.20.0 https://gitbox.apache.org/repos/asf/commons-codec
```

<a id="scm--access-from-behind-a-firewall"></a>

# Access from Behind a Firewall

Refer to the documentation of the SCM used for more information about access behind a firewall.

---

<a id="project-info"></a>

<!-- source_url: https://commons.apache.org/proper/commons-codec/project-info.html -->

<!-- page_index: 4 -->

<a id="project-info--project-information"></a>

# Project Information

This document provides an overview of the various documents and links that are part of this project's general information. All of this content is automatically generated by [Maven](https://maven.apache.org) on behalf of the project.

<a id="project-info--overview"></a>

## Overview

| Document | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [About](#index) | The Apache Commons Codec component contains encoders and decoders for formats such as Base16, Base32, Base64, digest, and Hexadecimal. In addition to these widely used encoders and decoders, the codec package also maintains a collection of phonetic encoding utilities. |
| [Summary](https://commons.apache.org/proper/commons-codec/summary.html) | This document lists other related information of this project |
| [Team](#team) | This document provides information on the members of this project. These are the individuals who have contributed to the project in one form or another. |
| [Source Code Management](#scm) | This document lists ways to access the online source repository. |
| [Issue Management](https://commons.apache.org/proper/commons-codec/issue-management.html) | This document provides information on the issue management system used in this project. |
| [Mailing Lists](https://commons.apache.org/proper/commons-codec/mailing-lists.html) | This document provides subscription and archive information for this project's mailing lists. |
| [Maven Coordinates](https://commons.apache.org/proper/commons-codec/dependency-info.html) | This document describes how to include this project as a dependency using various dependency management tools. |
| [Dependency Management](https://commons.apache.org/proper/commons-codec/dependency-management.html) | This document lists the dependencies that are defined through dependencyManagement. |
| [Dependencies](https://commons.apache.org/proper/commons-codec/dependencies.html) | This document lists the project's dependencies and provides information on each dependency. |
| [Dependency Convergence](https://commons.apache.org/proper/commons-codec/dependency-convergence.html) | This document presents the convergence of dependency versions across the entire project, and its sub modules. |
| [CI Management](#ci-management) | This document lists the continuous integration management system of this project for building and testing code on a frequent, regular basis. |
| [Distribution Management](https://commons.apache.org/proper/commons-codec/distribution-management.html) | This document provides informations on the distribution management of this project. |

---

<a id="team"></a>

<!-- source_url: https://commons.apache.org/proper/commons-codec/team.html -->

<!-- page_index: 5 -->

<a id="team--project-team"></a>

# Project Team

A successful project requires many people to play many roles. Some members write code or documentation, while others are valuable as testers, submitting patches and suggestions.

The project team is comprised of Members and Contributors. Members have direct access to the source of a project and actively evolve the code-base. Contributors improve the project through submission of patches and suggestions to the Members. The number of Contributors to the project is unbounded. Get involved today. All contributions to the project are greatly appreciated.

<a id="team--members"></a>

## Members

The following is a list of developers with commit privileges that have directly contributed to the project in one way or another.

<!-- source_url: https://commons.apache.org/proper/commons-codec/ci-management.html -->

<!-- page_index: 6 -->

<a id="ci-management--overview"></a>

# Overview

This project uses [GitHub Actions](https://github.com/features/actions/).

<a id="ci-management--access"></a>

# Access

The following is a link to the continuous integration system used by the project:

```
https://github.com/apache/commons-codec/actions
```

<a id="ci-management--notifiers"></a>

# Notifiers

No notifiers are defined. Please check back at a later date.

<a id="project-reports"></a>

<!-- source_url: https://commons.apache.org/proper/commons-codec/project-reports.html -->

<!-- page_index: 7 -->

<a id="project-reports--generated-reports"></a>

# Generated Reports

This document provides an overview of the various reports that are automatically generated by [Maven](https://maven.apache.org) . Each report is briefly described below.

<a id="project-reports--overview"></a>

## Overview

| Document | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [Changes](#changes) | Changes report on releases of this project. |
| [JIRA Report](#jira-changes) | Report on Issues from the JIRA Issue Tracking System. |
| [Javadoc](https://commons.apache.org/proper/commons-codec/apidocs/index.html) | Javadoc API documentation. |
| [Source Xref](https://commons.apache.org/proper/commons-codec/xref/index.html) | HTML based, cross-reference version of Java source code. |
| [Test Source Xref](https://commons.apache.org/proper/commons-codec/xref-test/index.html) | HTML based, cross-reference version of Java test source code. |
| [Surefire](#surefire) | Report on the test results of the project. |
| [RAT Report](#rat-report) | Report on compliance to license related source code policies. |
| [JaCoCo](https://commons.apache.org/proper/commons-codec/jacoco/index.html) | JaCoCo Coverage Report. |
| [japicmp](#japicmp) | Comparing source compatibility of commons-codec-1.22.0.jar against commons-codec-1.21.0.jar |
| [Checkstyle](#checkstyle) | Report on coding style conventions. |
| [CPD](#cpd) | Duplicate code detection. |
| [PMD](#pmd) | Verification of coding rules. |
| [SpotBugs](#spotbugs) | Generates a source code report with the SpotBugs Library. |
| [Tag List](#taglist) | Report on various tags found in the code. |

---

<tr>
<td>org/apache/commons/codec/digest/MurmurHash3.java</td>
<td><a href="https://commons.apache.org/proper/commons-codec/xref/org/apache/commons/codec/digest/MurmurHash3.html#L570">570</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td>org/apache/commons/codec/digest/MurmurHash3.java</td>
<td><a href="https://commons.apache.org/proper/commons-codec/xref/org/apache/commons/codec/digest/MurmurHash3.html#L1071">1071</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td colspan="2">
<pre>case 7:
            k1 ^= ((long) data[index + 6] &amp; 0xff) &lt;&lt; 48;
            // falls-through
        case 6:
            k1 ^= ((long) data[index + 5] &amp; 0xff) &lt;&lt; 40;
            // falls-through
        case 5:
            k1 ^= ((long) data[index + 4] &amp; 0xff) &lt;&lt; 32;
            // falls-through
        case 4:
            k1 ^= ((long) data[index + 3] &amp; 0xff) &lt;&lt; 24;
            // falls-through
        case 3:
            k1 ^= ((long) data[index + 2] &amp; 0xff) &lt;&lt; 16;
            // falls-through
        case 2:
            k1 ^= ((long) data[index + 1] &amp; 0xff) &lt;&lt; 8;
            // falls-through
        case 1:
            k1 ^= data[index] &amp; 0xff;</pre></td></tr></table>

<tr>
<td colspan="2">
<pre>txt = txt.replaceAll("[aeiou]", "3");
        txt = txt.replace("3gh3", "3kh3");
        txt = txt.replace("gh", "22");
        txt = txt.replace("g", "k");
        txt = txt.replaceAll("s+", "S");
        txt = txt.replaceAll("t+", "T");
        txt = txt.replaceAll("p+", "P");
        txt = txt.replaceAll("k+", "K");
        txt = txt.replaceAll("f+", "F");
        txt = txt.replaceAll("m+", "M");
        txt = txt.replaceAll("n+", "N");
        txt = txt.replace("w3", "W3");
        txt = txt.replace("wy", "Wy"); // 1.0 only</pre></td></tr></table>

<td colspan="2">
<pre>public static int hash32(final byte[] data, final int offset, final int length, final int seed) {
        int hash = seed;
        final int nblocks = length &gt;&gt; 2;
        // body
        for (int i = 0; i &lt; nblocks; i++) {
            final int index = offset + (i &lt;&lt; 2);
            final int k = MurmurHash.getLittleEndianInt(data, index);
            hash = mix32(k, hash);
        }
        // tail
        // Note: This fails to apply masking using 0xff to the 3 remaining bytes.
        final int index = offset + (nblocks &lt;&lt; 2);
        int k1 = 0;
        switch (offset + length - index) {
        case 3:
            k1 ^= data[index + 2] &lt;&lt; 16;</pre></td></tr></table>
